---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want?
<!-- A clear one-line description of the feature. -->


## Why is this needed?
<!-- What problem does it solve, or what workflow does it enable? Who does it help and how often? -->


## How should it work?
<!-- Describe the behaviour you have in mind — UI, interactions, data flow, edge cases. Be as specific or as rough as you like; sketches and mockups welcome. -->


## What's the alternative today?
<!-- How do you currently work around the absence of this feature, if at all? -->


## Scope and constraints
<!-- Any technical considerations, performance concerns, or things this feature should *not* do. Leave blank if unsure. -->


## Priority / impact
<!-- How much does the absence of this feature slow you down? Nice-to-have / important / blocking. -->
